productDisplayName: Basics Men Purple Slim Fit Checked Shirt
description: CompositionPurple, black and white checked shirt made of 100% cotton, with full length sleeves that can be rolled into half sleeves and flapped pockets on either chestFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptlyLine dry in shade inside outWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDesigned for the man of style, this semi-formal cotton shirt doubles up as a casual too with its roll-up sleeves. So when on a formal meet, let the sleeves cover your hands, and when casual, simply roll them up and button them away to flaunt those well-toned arms. The cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day, while you carry yourself in style in those meetings. Team this with jeans or trousers and semi-formal shoes for that cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5"
